implementation.approach: filter lessons array by current lesson.part, sort by lesson number, render dynamically
implementation.changes_summary: Removed hardcoded [0,1,2,3] array; added partLessons filter, currentPartIndex, responsive dot sizing (w-2 h-2 for <=20 lessons, w-1.5 h-1.5 for larger parts), overflow-x-auto for mobile safety, aria-label + title for accessibility

mobile_layout_notes: overflow-x-auto prevents overflow; large parts (>20) use smaller dots (w-1.5 h-1.5, gap-1) to reduce horizontal space
